d:
When Galahad casts her Ultimate, she consumes [[400]] Energy to deal [[340%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies. She then begins forming a 2-tile-radius magic circle centered on her position. The circle remains active as long as Galahad stays at its center.
While the magic circle is forming, Galahad consumes [[60]] Energy every second to increase the circle's forming progress by 10%. When the forming progress reaches 100%, she stops consuming Energy and gains [[30]] Haste.
Enemies inside the magic circle lose [[10]] Haste and [[16%]] movement speed for every 10% of the circle's forming progress, up to a max reduction of [[50]] Haste and [[80%]] movement speed.
While Galahad stays at the center of her circle, whenever she casts a skill, a shadow of herself appears shortly after and casts the same skill. The shadow inherits [[60%]] of Galahad's stats.
Increases the damage dealt to [[380%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[420%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[460%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[500%]]<ATK>.

Galahad deals [[210%]]<ATK> damage to the enemy who has dealt the most cumulative damage and immobilizes them for [[4]]s. The immobilized target cannot move or act and loses HP equal to [[50%]] of the non-excess healing they have received since they were last immobilized by this skill; the HP loss cannot exceed [[500%]]<ATK>. In boss fights, the HP loss becomes fixed at [[125%]]<ATK>.
After the initial strike, Galahad expands this skill's range by 1 tile and deals [[140%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies within range. She then repeats the sequence for a third strike.
Increases initial strike damage to [[240%]]<ATK> and damage of the following two strikes to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Increases initial strike damage to [[270%]]<ATK> and damage of the following two strikes to [[180%]]<ATK>.
Increases initial strike damage to [[300%]]<ATK> and damage of the following two strikes to [[200%]]<ATK>.
Galahad casts a protection spell on the [[weakest]] ally, granting them a [[480%]]<ATK> shield that lasts for [[8]]s. When the shield expires, it deals [[240%]]<ATK> damage to adjacent enemies.
Increases the shield value to [[520%]]<ATK> and the damage dealt when the shield expires to [[260%]]<ATK>.
Increases the shield value to [[560%]]<ATK> and the damage dealt when the shield expires to [[280%]]<ATK>.
Increases the shield value to [[600%]]<ATK> and the damage dealt when the shield expires to [[300%]]<ATK>.
Galahad increases her ATK by [[9%]] during battle. She also gains an extra [[6%]] ATK when her magic circle is fully formed.
Galahad increases her ATK by [[12%]] during battle. She also gains an extra [[8%]] ATK when her magic circle is fully formed.
Galahad increases her ATK by [[15%]] during battle. She also gains an extra [[10%]] ATK when her magic circle is fully formed.

When a battle starts, Galahad marks the nearest allied hero, prioritizing the one behind her. When Galahad's magic circle is fully formed for the first time, she summons a shadow that recreates the marked ally as they were at the start of battle.
The shadow remains on the battlefield for [[12]]s, inheriting [[80%]] of the ally's basic stats and starting with [[400]] extra Initial Energy. A shadow is not considered a living hero and cannot be targeted by enemies.
The summoned shadow now inherits [[100%]] of the marked ally's basic stats.

When Galahad's magic circle is fully formed for the first time, Magister Merlin's skills grant stat buffs that are [[20%]] stronger and last [[100%]] longer. Every time Magister Merlin casts a skill, a shadow of Merlin appears nearby and casts the same skill again, causing [[60%]] as much [[HP loss]] as Merlin's original skill does.
The summoned shadow now inherits [[120%]] of the marked ally's basic stats.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, casting an Ultimate increases damage dealt by [[8%]] for the next [[8]]s. Unstackable. The first Ultimate cast also permanently increases Energy recovery from attacking by [[8%]].
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Haste, 10 DEF Penetration.

d: While Galahad is affected by Merlin's buffs, she recovers [[40]] Energy per second and becomes [[steadfast]]. The [[steadfast]] effect granted by this skill cannot exceed a total of [[30]]s.
